evals.prompt: Create a .tscn file for a treasure chest pickup in my Godot 4 RPG. It should be an Area2D root node named 'Chest', with a Sprite2D child for the chest visual (texture at res://assets/sprites/items/chest.png), a CollisionShape2D child with a CircleShape2D (radius 16) for player detection, and a script attached at res://scripts/pickups/chest.gd. Write the complete .tscn file content to examples/forge-of-worlds/scenes/pickups/chest.tscn.
evals.expected_output: A valid .tscn file with correct section ordering (header -> ext_resource -> sub_resource -> node), proper ext_resource entries for the script and texture, a sub_resource for CircleShape2D, correct parent paths, and script = ExtResource() on the root node.

evals.prompt: Edit the existing player scene at examples/forge-of-worlds/scenes/player/player.tscn to add a DetectionZone. Add an Area2D node called 'DetectionZone' as a child of the root Player node. It needs a CircleShape2D with radius 80 as a sub-resource, referenced by a CollisionShape2D child of DetectionZone. Set the DetectionZone's collision_layer to 0 and collision_mask to 4. Also add a signal connection: connect DetectionZone's 'body_entered' signal to the root node's '_on_detection_zone_body_entered' method.
evals.expected_output: The existing player.tscn file with new sub_resource for CircleShape2D added in the sub_resource section (not after nodes), new DetectionZone Area2D and CollisionShape2D nodes with correct parent paths, collision_layer/mask integers set correctly, and a [connection] block at the end of the file.

evals.prompt:
This .tscn file has several format errors. Find and fix ALL of them:

```
[gd_scene format=3]

[node name="Enemy" type="CharacterBody2D"]
script = preload("res://scripts/enemy.gd")
position = (100, 200)

[ext_resource type="Texture2D" path="res://sprites/enemy.png" id="1_tex"]

[sub_resource type="CircleShape2D" id="CircleShape2D_abc"]
radius = 12.0

[node name="Sprite2D" type="Sprite2D" parent="Enemy"]
texture = ExtResource("1_tex")

[node name="CollisionShape2D" type="CollisionShape2D"]
shape = SubResource("CircleShape2D_xyz")
```

List each error you find and provide the corrected .tscn file.
evals.expected_output: Should identify at minimum: 1) preload() is invalid in .tscn (use ExtResource), 2) position uses wrong syntax (should be Vector2(100, 200)), 3) ext_resource is after nodes (wrong section order), 4) Sprite2D parent should be '.' not 'Enemy', 5) CollisionShape2D is missing parent attribute, 6) SubResource references non-existent id 'CircleShape2D_xyz' (should be 'CircleShape2D_abc'). Corrected file should have proper ordering and all fixes applied.
